zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Paunton於1314年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Robert de Paunton II26歲，母親Mrs Robert de Paunton25歲。她於大約1334年與Hugh de Cressy在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1355年8月9日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Paunton于1314年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Robert de Paunton II26岁，母亲Mrs Robert de Paunton25岁。她于大约1334年与Hugh de Cressy在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1355年8月9日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Paunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Painting, a name chiefly found in Oxfordshire which is itself either a variant of Penton , Pennington , Pointon or Panton .

variants.name: Penton
meanings: habitational name from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hanmpshire), or from a shortened form of Pennington 2. The placenames denoted a farm or estate for which a penny tax was payable (Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn).
in north-west England, a shortened form of   Pennington   1, from either of the places called Pennington in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Paunton was born in 1314, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Paunton II, was 26 and her mother, Mrs Robert de Paunton, was 25. She married Hugh de Cressy about 1334, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 9 August 1355, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Paunton est née en 1314, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Paunton II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs Robert de Paunton, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Cressy environ 1334, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1355, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Paunton 1314 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Paunton II 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs Robert de Paunton 25. Sie hat um 1334 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Hugh de Cressy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. August 1355 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Paunton è nata il nel 1314 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Paunton II, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mrs Robert de Paunton, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Cressy circa 1334, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 agosto 1355, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Pauntonが1314年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Paunton IIは26歳，母Mrs Robert de Pauntonは25歳であった。約1334年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでHugh de Cressyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1355年8月9日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Paunton(이)가 1314년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Paunton II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Robert de Paunton(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Hugh de Cressy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 8월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Paunton nasceu em 1314, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Paunton II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Robert de Paunton, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Cressy aproximadamente 1334, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1355, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Paunton родилась в 1314 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Paunton II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Robert de Paunton, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Cressy около 1334 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 9 августа 1355 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda de Paunton nació en 1314, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Paunton II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs Robert de Paunton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Hugh de Cressy aproximadamente 1334, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1355, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
